$comment: Maps a Playwright screenshot name (from toHaveScreenshot('NAME.png')) to its doc image destinations under assets/img/. Each entry has a `light` and `dark` target; `npm run sync-docs` copies the standalone-light baseline to `light` and standalone-dark to `dark`. `dark` is optional — omit it for shots with no dark variant in the docs. CONFIRM these paths against the real docs before committing regenerated images. The agentgateway docs render dark variants via the {{< reuse-image-dark srcDark=... >}} shortcode; dark filenames here follow the existing -dark.png convention.
